allow: PowerShell(node -e "const d=require\('./src/modules/punishment/commands/discipline.js'\); const c=require\('./src/modules/punishment/commands/disciplineConfig.js'\); console.log\('discipline:', d.data.name, '| subs:', d.data.toJSON\(\).options.map\(o=>o.name\).join\(','\)\); console.log\('config:', c.data.name, '| subs:', c.data.toJSON\(\).options.map\(o=>o.name\).join\(','\)\); console.log\('exec types:', typeof d.execute, typeof c.execute\);")
